text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The time has come, at long last! My springtime
hurdle leading to the Classics—my Dragon Gate!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...You look confused, Trainer. Do you know the
story of the Dragon Gate?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Long, long ago, in ancient China, it
was said that if a carp could leap to the top of
this great waterfall, it would transform into a
dragon.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Which means if I can clear this hurdle, I'll turn into
a dragon too!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: So just for today, the name's Matikarp-streamer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Carp streamer, high above the rooftops! ♪ A
giant carp swimming in a cool summer stream! ♪
choice_data_list:
Isn't that a Children's Day song? It's only
March...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Singing that tune got me pumped up! Watch me
blast my way up that waterfall and to the finish
line!
